description_long: This is a festive ceramic teapot featuring a white base adorned with a central Christmas tree motif, decorated with colorful ornaments and presents. The handle is designed to resemble a red and white candy cane, adding a whimsical holiday touch. The spout is elegantly curved and positioned opposite the handle, with a small holly decoration near its base. The teapot has a domed lid topped with a small bird-shaped knob and subtle embossed leaf patterns. A green band encircles the rim just below the lid, providing a visual accent. The overall shape is rounded and bulbous, with a smooth, glossy finish that enhances its decorative appeal.
description: A white ceramic teapot with a Christmas tree motif, candy cane handle, and domed lid with a bird-shaped knob. Festive and glossy, it features colorful holiday decorations and a curved spout.
description_view_0: The teapot is shown with its decorated Christmas tree motif, candy cane handle, and domed lid with bird knob clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view centers on the spout and lid, with the holly decoration near the spout base and minimal visibility of the handle or main motif.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the teapot, again showing the Christmas tree motif and candy cane handle, with the spout angled to the left.
description_view_3: The back of the teapot, highlighting the full candy cane handle and the rounded body, with minimal decoration visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is gently curved, angled slightly upward, and positioned at the front of the teapot opposite the handle.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a thick, arched loop attached at the top and bottom, styled as a red and white candy cane with a smooth, rounded form.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a bird-shaped knob and a snug fit.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Christmas tree motif with colorful ornaments on the body, candy cane stripes on the handle, holly near the spout, and subtle embossed leaves on the lid.
